images.caption: Figure 1:The architecture of Speculative Pipeline Decoding when the number of stages is 3. The target LLM is partitioned into 3 stages. At the start point of this round, tokens (e.g.,x5x_{5}tox7x_{7}) reside in the pipeline at varying depths while others (e.g.,x1x_{1}tox4x_{4}) are fully processed tokens. For each token, hidden states from passed stages are projected via FC layers to form an aggregated feature, serving as the input to the Pipeline Speculation Module. The Speculation Module speculates the next token (x8x_{8}) simultaneously with the target LLM’s pipeline forward step. Thenx8x_{8}’s token embedding is added to the pipeline for the next round, while the target LLM verifies the oldest token in the pipeline (x6x_{6}) based on ground-truth output logits of the tokenx5x_{5}that is just popped out of the pipeline.

header: Appendix ATraining-Time Alignment with Dynamic Inference
